allow: PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\Owner\\autopilot"; Get-ChildItem node_modules -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -in @\('react','react-dom','three','@react-three','framer-motion','vite','tailwindcss'\) } | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem node_modules\\@react-three -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell(Get-PSDrive C | Select-Object @{n='FreeMB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1MB,1\)}}; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\Owner\\autopilot\\node_modules\\framer-motion\\dist\\es" | Select-Object Name, Length | Select-Object -First 10)
PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\Owner\\autopilot"; npx vite build 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -match "error|Error|warn" } | Select-Object -First 20)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($response\) { Write-Output "Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)"; $response.Content | Select-String "error|Error|Error" } else { Write-Output "Could not reach server" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\Owner\\autopilot\\src\\components" | ForEach-Object { Remove-Item $_.FullName -Force }; Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\Owner\\autopilot\\src\\pages" | ForEach-Object { Remove-Item $_.FullName -Force }; Write-Host "Done")

PowerShell(curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3001/api/events/stream --max-time 3; Write-Host ""; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:5173/api/events/stream --max-time 3)

PowerShell(node --version; Write-Host "---"; if \($env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY\) { Write-Host "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set in system env \(length: $\($env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.Length\)\)" } else { Write-Host "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is NOT set in system env" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/generate-post" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"topic":"test","platform":"Instagram"}'; $r | ConvertTo-Json } catch { Write-Host "HTTP $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"; $reader = [System.IO.StreamReader]::new\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Host $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) })
